'''Boor-Daa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] who was one of the co-directors of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]].

==Biography==
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], he thought [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] too ambitious and forward-thinking for both his own and the Combine's good, but advocated allowing him to continue to lead during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. Stark killed him, and the other co-directors, in the Combine's headquarters during the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]].
